relations: Spiders produce silk from their spinnerets for various purposes including web building
Spiders use spinnerets located at their abdomen to produce silk
Spiders produce silk to construct their webs
Silk is the material used by spiders to construct webs
Spiders use their skill and silk to build webs as homes and hunting grounds
